proof_payload.body: {"apiVersion":"sentinel-api-0.1.0","artifactSchema":"sentinel.verdict.canonical.v1","confidence":100,"evaluatedAt":1783407984,"mode":"trade_reasoning","models":{"primary":"serv-nano","secondary":"serv-swift"},"objections":["step_0: The cited numerical thresholds are met by the visible evidence: 7d change is 186.85%, RSI14 is 92.91, and the thesis explicitly states $6.3B in 24h volume. There is no contradiction in the visible trace.","step_2: The thesis does not contradict itself: it identifies a blow-off-top setup, acknowledges the main counterargument, and explains that the short is sized modestly because of that uncertainty. The conclusion follows from the stated reasoning without unsupported leaps."],"reasoning":"All critical steps adequately supported.\n\n[sentinel-cascade primary_hold: primary=HOLD, secondary=ALLOW]","tier":"standard","verdict":"UNCERTAIN","verificationId":"sent_b982f4f28b0f4f03"}
